message:
refactor(net): move blocking I/O to spawn_blocking for true async

Improve network module to properly offload blocking operations
to the blocking thread pool.

dns/resolver.rs:
- Move DNS resolution to spawn_blocking for non-blocking async
- Remove #![allow(clippy::unused_async)] - async is now meaningful
- Add cancellation safety documentation
- Improve retry logic within blocking context

tcp/stream.rs:
- Improve connect timeout handling
- Better error context for connection failures

unix/listener.rs:
- Enhance Unix socket listener with better accept handling
- Add SO_REUSEADDR support
- Improve error messages

This ensures that DNS lookups and socket operations don't block
the async runtime, improving overall throughput.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
